name: @cap/sandbox
description: Compatibility aggregate for CAP sandbox core, scheduler, lifecycle, workspace, conformance, and adapter packages.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-core build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-scheduler build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-lifecycle build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-workspace-git build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-aio-local build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-cloud-http build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-aio build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-core build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-scheduler build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-lifecycle build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-workspace-git build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-aio-local build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-cloud-http build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-aio build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
